Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Raion]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Raion is a character with bright red skin and a golden eye in his forehead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Raion has three eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion wears a red combat suit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion is a mage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion wants to be the Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion is considered one of the best personal combatants in the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion is a Visiri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion has mastered an Aetheric Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion can move in a red flash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion is surrounded by a burning crimson aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion can use crimson energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion can summon a Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion is the only living master of the Aetheric sword art Dance of a Burning World.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion uses a force-blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Raion's force-blade is a three-foot laser-edged plane of bright red light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Raion Raithe is a member of the Titan Knights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Raion Raithe is a Knight of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Raion was formerly a Knight of the Titan Force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Raion was standing with the narrator and Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Raion is a friend of the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Raion possesses a plasma pistol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Raion picks up freelance bounty contracts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Raion is one of the few people who saw the end of the digital selection tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — Varic has fought Raion in virtual space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 26''' — Raion has spent much of his career dissecting moon-sized insectoid creatures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 26''' — Raion is a character who has no problem killing monsters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — Raion wears crimson armor and uses a scarlet force-blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — Raion picked up the narrator and flew to a Vallenar Corporation ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — Raion is a crew member Horizon intends to recall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — Raion has crimson eyes and a third golden eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — Raion is a character who can be sympathetic to others' mourning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — Raion is in better physical shape than he was previously.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — Raion can slash ships in half.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Raion has veins of sunlight-colored energy running over his skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Raion is a Visiri warrior and a Titan Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Raion was the pilot inside the Divine Titan mech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Raion likely broke several ribs during the fall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Raion has a unique ability to channel the power of friendship through bonds with those who trust him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Raion has fought alongside the Titan Force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Raion is a character on the bridge of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Raion was almost chosen to be the Engineer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — Raion has a crimson bicep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — Raion tried to control his Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — Raion believes that Sola and the narrator are motivated by a fear of dying for nothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — Raion is a member of the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Raion wears a red-plated combat suit without a helmet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Raion controls a Titan and uses a force-blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Raion has mental seals to keep his mind intact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Raion lost control of his Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Raion's Divine Titan is a mech that was cracked and on the verge of destruction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — Raion believes the Iron King is dead.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 2''' — Raion is a crew member who can perform physical exercises at high speeds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 5''' — Raion intends to defend the galaxy from the return of the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Raion is a crew member on The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Raion is a crew member tasked with engaging the slipwraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Raion is physically holding two decks of The Last Horizon together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Raion is a character who can use Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Raion is capable of calling Divine Titans while inside Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Raion is unhurt and assisting the Karoshan engineering team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Raion can be stalled by Voidhoppers moving in and out of Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Raion stated that they saved everyone from attacking the Karoshan ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — Raion's request was to defeat Swarm-Queen Esh’kinaar of the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — Raion remained quiet during the interaction between Shyrax and Mell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 22''' — Raion has a broad smile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 26''' — The Captain does not feel much older than Raion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — Raion is a Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Raion is a member of the crew and was previously in the Titan Force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Raion is a Knight who uses a massive hydraulic press for training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Raion uses a self-contained treadmill with external speakers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Raion is considered insurance against Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Raion tore Starhammer apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Raion is currently repairing his combat suit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — Raion suggests talking to Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — Raion emerged from Horizon’s teleportation onto the surface of Nyron Seven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — Raion slashed his hand from left to right, creating a sheet of fire that divided Undermaker's ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Raion reached the shuttle sent for him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Raion bargained onto a transport ship to save his best friend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Raion has a crimson face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Raion will not rest until the narrator is free.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 53''' — Raion is fighting Starhammer.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — Raion is a Titan Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — Raion bolted down the hallway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 3''' — Raion is someone Omega takes lessons from regarding having faith in friends.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — The narrator needs to check on Raion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Raion tested Shyrax for her application to The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 6''' — Raion is capable of igniting his energy to blast through crowds at full speed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — Raion is a Knight who uses a Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — Raion was fighting without his helmet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Raion is addressed as Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — Raion is a character who met the narrator after his ritual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — Raion has a third eye that glows gold when scanning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Raion was exiled from the Raithe family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Raion has immense natural talent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — Raion's parents retired off-planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — Raion's brother was a senatorial aide and intends to become a Senator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — Raion wears a Titan Force uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — Raion is the brother of Ryzer Raithe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — Raion has a brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — Raion is someone whose questions the narrator would expect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Raion is someone Varic intends to speak with regarding his findings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Raion is someone the narrator needs to tell about the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Raion is a person who fits the description of a Gatekeeper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — Raion is on a mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — Raion is referred to as Red by the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — Raion uses the Dance of a Burning World technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Several planets evacuated ahead of the D’Niss invasion, including Raion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Raion is working alone on Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 27''' — Raion's Combat Art is the Dance of a Burning World.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Raion won the second round of his fights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Raion is on Visiria doing diplomatic work.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Raion's voice was heard through the ship's wall speakers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 29''' — Raion was a warrior.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 30''' — Raion is a fighter who previously fought Mua.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 30''' — Raion was covered in thick bandages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — Raion was one of the original Titan Knights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 32''' — Raion's medical room is equipped with a massive drill and a military-grade laser.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — Raion wanted to go back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Raion was almost lost to Hesh’ellik.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Raion cannot take on a D’Niss with the Dance of a Burning World.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — Raion is a crew member of The Last Horizon who was not at his post.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — King Regent Felrex's Combat Art was worthy of Raion in the Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Raion is someone the narrator might need to seek forgiveness from.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Raion needs time to recover.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — Raion is from the planet Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Raion has a console that can be controlled via telekinesis.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Raion is in no shape to pilot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Raion is the pilot of the Red Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Raion is a companion that the Captain intends to go after.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — Raion had not yet reached Esh’kinaar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — Raion is a pilot who fights alongside the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Raion is a Red Knight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Raion uses a force-blade and a shield of crimson flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Raion has a private constellation of stars.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — Raion is a three-eyed individual who accompanies the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — The narrator suspects Rellask has 'seen too much Raion' in him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Raion puts his fists on his hips.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Raion promises they will find the missing components.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — Raion uses a mech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — Raion put his hands on Omega’s shoulder and guided him away from the console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Raion manages the ship's shields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Raion uses crimson energy to supplement the ship's shields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Raion has a damaged Divine Titan covered in golden veins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Raion has scarlet skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Raion wears white gloves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Raion is not currently aboard the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The Captain wishes Raion were present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Raion is expected to arrive soon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Raion is doing what he thinks is right.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Raion is piloting the Red Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Raion wears an armored uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Raion has grown more capable since fighting the Iron King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 35''' — Raion expresses trust in Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Raion recently returned from Shadow Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Raion announced that Omega will find out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Raion is a person the narrator leaves one-on-one showdowns to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Raion is fighting Aila's daughter and his mech is down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Raion is an ally of Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Raion would not conquer planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Raion was trying to persuade Horizon to let him back into the fight.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
